calendar.matters: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Jul-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Thomas Wrobel, for Debra Dolch, Petitioner.
McKenna Longchamps, for Leonard Graham, Objector.

The court acknowledges the recently filed competing petition. After discussion and confirmation, this matter is continued to Jul-06-2026 to be heard alongside Objector's petition.

Judge: Hon. Michael McNaughton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
